case_title: JESS MIRAGLIA VS. ERICA SITTON, ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-24-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-19-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SITTON, ERICA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,385.06 FILED BY MIRAGLIA, JESS AS TO DEFENDANT SITTON, ERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-19-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PAPING, CHARLES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRAGLIA, JESS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SITTON, ERICA PAPING, CHARLES AFTER EXTENSIVELY REVIEWING THE PHOTOS OF THE ACCIDENT LOCATION AND THOSE PHOTOS ON GOOGLE MAPS, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE DEFENDANTS WERE NEGLIGENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO DEFENDANT CHARLES PAPING.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
